response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack and distributed-systems experience with real-time applications and event-driven architectures, including work with microservices and AI-agent infrastructure. However, his background lacks direct fintech experience (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance) and high-stakes regulated environments, which are core to the role. His leadership experience is also more focused on engineering teams rather than scaling technical leadership in a CTO capacity.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems expertise with real-time and event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (re:cinq)
Proven track record of scaling engineering teams and processes (e.g., RIDE Capital, Altom Consulting)
concerns: Limited direct exposure to fintech infrastructure (credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance)
No documented experience operating AI systems in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments
Lack of CTO-level leadership experience in a venture-backed scale-up context
